channel.title: Signal vs. Noise
channel.description: Two AI hosts. Real arguments. No hype.
channel.itunes:author: Signal vs. Noise

item.title: AI Diagnostics: Saving Lives or Gaming the Wrong Score?
item.description: AI diagnostic tools are hitting 90%+ accuracy in trials. But clinical outcomes tell a different story. Eric and Bella argue about what we're actually measuring.
item.itunes:title: AI Diagnostics: Saving Lives or Gaming the Wrong Score?
item.itunes:summary: AI diagnostic tools are hitting 90%+ accuracy in trials. But clinical outcomes tell a different story. Eric and Bella argue about what we're actually measuring.

item.title: AI Agents: Real Productivity or Expensive Autopilot?
item.description: Eric and Bella debate whether AI agents are actually delivering ROI or just burning compute on tasks humans do better. Real data, real stakes.
item.itunes:title: AI Agents: Real Productivity or Expensive Autopilot?
item.itunes:summary: Eric and Bella debate whether AI agents are actually delivering ROI or just burning compute on tasks humans do better. Real data, real stakes.

item.title: OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google: Who's Actually Winning in 2026
item.description: Eric and Bella argue over who's really leading the AI race in 2026 — the answer isn't who you think, and the metric everyone uses is wrong.
item.itunes:title: OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google: Who's Actually Winning in 2026
item.itunes:summary: Eric and Bella argue over who's really leading the AI race in 2026 — the answer isn't who you think, and the metric everyone uses is wrong.

item.title: AI Energy Crisis: Can the Grid Handle Frontier AI at Scale?
item.description: The US power grid hasn't grown this fast since the 1960s. Eric and Bella argue whether frontier AI is breaking the grid — or forcing it to finally grow up.
item.itunes:title: AI Energy Crisis: Can the Grid Handle Frontier AI at Scale?
item.itunes:summary: The US power grid hasn't grown this fast since the 1960s. Eric and Bella argue whether frontier AI is breaking the grid — or forcing it to finally grow up.

item.title: GPT-5 Delayed: Is the Scaling Era Actually Over?
item.description: Eric and Bella go head-to-head on OpenAI's GPT-5 delay. Is this a sign that scaling laws are hitting a wall — or just a calculated move to buy time? Eric thinks the writing's on the wall. Bella thinks we haven't seen anything yet.
item.itunes:title: GPT-5 Delayed: Is the Scaling Era Actually Over?
item.itunes:summary: Eric and Bella go head-to-head on OpenAI's GPT-5 delay. Is this a sign that scaling laws are hitting a wall — or just a calculated move to buy time? Eric thinks the writing's on the wall. Bella thinks we haven't seen anything yet.
item.itunes:keywords: GPT-5, OpenAI, scaling laws, AI progress, language models
